creator: lidl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #3)

It would be easy enough to remove the logging of the failure to to talk to the blacklist daemon, but then how is a user supposed to debug the case where they want blacklistd and it's not working properly?

The *.debug level is the supposed to be the lowest level (outside of informational) that syslog supports.
